query:
-- Verify current state of UCXcel Webex Basic services with revenue
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  s.costSource,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost > 0 
      THEN ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1)
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost = 0
      THEN 100.0
    ELSE NULL 
  END as marginPercent
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC;

  CASE

    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost = 0
      THEN 100.0
    ELSE NULL 
  END as marginPercent
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC;
